apps.title: Paranoize
apps.summary:
Eleven years after a mysterious, colossal object fell into the mountains of Japan, destiny stirs once more. In a secluded dojo, a blind youth trains with his wooden sword, driven by a voice only he can hear.

An all-star cast brings the story to life in a fully voiced animated series.

Step into the forefront of the comics and manga experience—
The Age of Cinematic Comics is here.

apps.title: Hope Zone
apps.summary:
A mysterious virus has brought the world to ruin.
You are the last beacon of hope, the leader of the survivor city.
Uncover the truth behind the apocalypse and defend against waves of evolving zombies.
Will you open your gates and rebuild together… or hoard resources to rule alone?
Every choice you make shapes humanity's fate.

〓 GAME FEATURES 〓

〓 CITY BUILDING & TOWER DEFENSE〓
▶ Fortify your base, manage resources, and repel the evolving zombies.
Your every decision impacts the city's survival.
Will you fortify the walls against zombies, or focus on farming and create a self-sustaining civilization?

〓 SURVIVORS WITH STORIES〓
▶ Each survivor you recruit carries their own past and pain.
Listen to their stories and witness the struggle of humanity in a broken world.

〓 STRATEGIC MANAGEMENT〓
▶ Assign survivors you recruit to gather, transport, fight, or defend.
Send them to the frontlines or nurture their talents to strengthen your city's core.
Balance defense and development to keep the city running.

〓 ZOMBIE SIEGE & WASTELAND EXPLORATION〓
▶ The undead keep evolving, becoming stronger with each wave.
Venture beyond the city walls to hunt terrifying mutants and uncover the virus's source.
Every mission is a gamble between life and death.

〓 TECHNOLOGY & PVP BATTLE〓
▶ Build a city of hope with science and technology, or conquer with strength to dominate the wasteland.
Whichever path you choose, civilization or might, survival demands power.

The battle for hope begins, and you lead the charge!

apps.title: Cool Lady
apps.summary:
Cool Lady is an easy-to-pick-up puzzle adventure game. Navigate through rooms filled with traps and mechanisms, and help the character safely reach the exit.

Move Pins, Avoid Traps
Each room is packed with items and monsters. Move pins to change the terrain, use props wisely to avoid danger, and plan a safe path to the exit. The controls are simple, but the later levels will challenge your observation and imagination.

Freely Switch Character Skins
Multiple male and female character skins are available in the game and can be unlocked as you progress. Change your character’s outfit anytime and enjoy a fresh look every time you play.

Earn Rewards Through Tasks
Complete daily missions, medal leagues, and other activities to collect coins and cash rewards. Once you accumulate enough, you can withdraw them to your personal account. Play a few rounds in your spare time and you might earn a pleasant little bonus along the way.

apps.title: Kid-E-Cats Hockey Elo
apps.summary:
The viral internet phenomenon is finally here! Get ready to hit the rink with Three Cats Hockey Elo, the most addictive and competitive arcade sports experience right now.

Build your team of three brave felines and face off against players from all over the world. Pass the puck, defend your goal, and score amazing shots. Every victory counts: thanks to our ELO ranking system, every match you win gets you closer to the champion's league.

Main Features:

Frantic 3v3 matches: Fast action, simple controls, and pure fun on the ice.

ELO ranking system: Show your skills. Win, level up, and become the best player in the world.

Join the trend: The game everyone is talking about, now in the palm of your hand.

Play anywhere: Intense and dynamic matches, perfect to play in your free time.

Put on your skates, grab your hockey stick, and lead your three cats to absolute victory!

apps.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash
apps.summary:
Discover the latest sensation from CookieRun—the franchise beloved by 200 million fans worldwide!
This real-time battle action reaches thrilling new heights.
Welcome to the CookieRun: OvenSmash!

Join the Cookies gathering in Platter City
Watch as they clash in epic battles to make their wishes come true
Step into an urban fantasy world of Cookies like nothing you've ever imagined!
Fight with everything you've got to fulfill your wish!


1. Immersive Urban Fantasy
Battle it out in a stunning urban fantasy setting!
All of Platter City becomes your battlefield as three powerful factions wage war for supremacy.
Dive into CookieRun's freshest world yet!

2. Deep Strategic Combat
Your position is your strategy!
Take on the role of Tanker, Dealer, or Supporter! Master unique combinations and synergies to rule the battlefield.
Experience heart-pounding strategic battles where a single skill choice can completely turn the tide!


3. Game-Changing Spell Cards
A single card can flip the match in your favor!
Transform into giants, summon sky-slicing dragons, and more with powerful spell cards.
Split-second decisions control the battlefield and determine victory!
Create your own winning strategies and dominate the competition!

4. Express Yourself with Custom Looks
Show off your style and stand out from the crowd!
Going for cute? Slick? Completely one-of-a-kind?
Dozens of looks and items let you create the perfect Cookie to match your vibe!
Become the trendiest Cookie that everyone can't help but notice!

5. Connect in the Plaza
Meet up with other Cookies in this special social hub!
Form parties in the plaza and gear up for epic battles together.
Enjoy both intense combat and chill hangout time with friends.
Experience CookieRun: OvenSmash's unique blend of action and social play!

apps.title: Word Sort Fun!
apps.summary:
Word Sort Fun! – When Word Puzzles Meets Fun Sort Games! Play word games mixed with strategic solitaire games. Sort and match words in satisfying puzzles. From exciting words connecting challenges to relaxing solitaire card games, every level is designed for a quick break or your daily brain workout!

🌟 Features of Word Sort Fun! 🌟
- Thousands of creative word puzzles that boost logic and vocabulary.
- An innovative blend of word solitaire associations and clever word puzzles.
- Fun card game with no timers – play at your own pace.
- Every decision counts – just like in classic solitaire card games.
- Offline mode – enjoy your favorite word solitaire card games anytime, anywhere.

🔍 How to Play Word Sort Fun!🔍
1. Place category cards to set the stage.
2. Draw words or image cards from the deck.
3. Win by clearing the board before running out of moves.
4. Apply solitaire association skills to organize all cards correctly.

🎯 Why Choose Word Sort Fun? 🎯
- Solve fun and tricky word connect puzzles.
- Explore unique solitaire associations mechanics.
- Master strategic thinking with word solitaire games.
- Perfect for all ages and skill levels — enjoy fun and relaxation anytime.

Download Word Sort Fun now! Enjoy the journey of word associations and solitaire games. Relax and train your mind with thousands of free and satisfying word solitaire puzzles today!

apps.title: Letter Tile Match - Word Games
apps.summary:
Letter Tile Match is a word puzzle game that combines classic word-building with match mechanics. Form words from letter tiles to break obstacles and complete level goals in a limited number of moves. Each correct word you submit removes tiles from the board, clears nearby objects, and opens space for new letter tiles to fall from above.

In this word game, the aim is to build real words using the letters on the board. The selected letter tiles disappear, obstacles next to and beneath them break, and the grid refills with new tiles. Every move changes the board and creates new opportunities to find words and clear space with the reaction caused by a tile match.

Letter Tile Match blends classic word puzzle games with the strategy of matching games. Plan each move carefully, choose words that clear maximum space, and meet your objective before you run out of moves. This matching game rewards smart decisions and analytical play. Inspired by the word search genre and word connect games, this free word game for adults offers a fresh take on puzzle gameplay with tile matching.

How to play this letter game

• The goal of this word puzzle is to meet level objectives within a limited number of moves.
• Look at the board and find words using the available letter tiles.
• Tap Submit to remove the selected letter tiles from the grid.
• Obstacles next to removed letters break, and ice beneath the tiles cracks.
• New letter tiles fall from above and create new opportunities to make a tile match.
• Longer words unlock boosters and help clear difficult sections of the board.
• You can't pass a level if you run out of moves before meeting the goal.

How to master this letter-matching game

• Look for longer words that will clear more tiles and free up space on the board.
• Target concentrated groups of obstacles so that one word can break several objects in one go.
• Save simple words for later when you might need a safe move to finish the level.
• Plan ahead and make every move count in this strategic matching game.

Letter Tile Match combines relaxing word games for adults with the satisfying mechanics of match games and tile match puzzles. Matching games for adults and thoughtful word puzzles come together in this game to create a calm and rewarding challenge.

Play Letter Tile Match to find words, solve various levels, and train your brain with engaging word puzzle games.

https://easybrain.com/terms

apps.title: BagMaster Isekai – Bag Battle
apps.summary:
ATTENTION ADVENTURERS

One minute you’re just chilling, playing your favorite game, and then next suddenly you’re IN the game! Welcome to the world of isekai, where you, the player, get to experience being transported to a whole new world. Here you’ll be helping the local piggies defeat waves of enemies in this delightful turn-based RPG. Collect and merge items in your bag to create awesome weapons, explore dungeons and castles, battle bosses, and test your strategy skills: on your mark, get set, oink!

SURVIVAL OF THE SMARTEST

In this roguelike RPG, you’ll have a chance before each wave of enemies to try and max out your weapons by merging them and using synergy to create bigger, better, and badder equipment. You’ll also have a chance to pick which buff you want to add at the end of the battle, allowing you to create and build on a strategy. The fun never ends in this role playing isekai game as you also get to explore new territories and grow your character!

Fun features:

- Bag it up – A key mechanic of this turn-based role playing game is your backpack. Use it to both store your gear as well as merge individual pieces to create stronger weapons and equipment.

- Waves on waves of enemies – as all good tactical strategy games go, this one too features tons of waves of increasingly strong enemies and bosses for you to test your ideas and might out on. That also gives you a chance to change tactics if you feel like your survival is at risk! Between battles you can make little adjustments that will add up over time and help you win… if you’re smart.

- Turn based strategy – that’s right, all those little buffs and weapons merges will either help or hinder you, and there’s no way of knowing if you picked the right battle plan until you’re facing down a horde of bosses. That’s the true joy of this type of roguelike RPG game!

- Roguelike goodness – As you wipe out your enemies and fight for survival, have fun exploring the various levels and learning more about your new world. Navigate through the maze of monsters as you level up and get to know your piggy overlords. The roguelike mechanics will make this isekai role playing game feel familiar for fans of the genre, while also being accessible to newer players.

- Fun in the sun – despite all the strategizing and merging and fighting you’ll be doing, this game is still about having fun after all! Build out your character, explore new realms, and of course, enjoy the great graphics and sound effects. With short battle waves you can always find time to squeeze in a fight or two!

THE OINKIEST TACTICAL STRATEGY GAME

Come one, come all, and let yourselves be transported to an exciting new world thanks to this roguelike role playing game. Use your magical bag to create the ultimate weapons as you seek survival by making the right choices each round. Let the turn-based roguelike mechanics lead the way as you battle your way through this dungeon crawler tactical strategy game and prove your might.

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: Tape Tap!
apps.summary:
Ever wondered what’s hidden beneath layers of colorful tape?

Tape Tap! is a fun and satisfying puzzle game where you peel, sort, twist, and unwrap vibrant tape strips tightly wrapped around cardboard boxes. Every move brings you closer to revealing the surprise inside, turning simple actions into a relaxing yet rewarding experience.

With smooth 3D visuals, the game encourages you to think carefully about the correct untaping order. Match colors, clear layered tape, and solve clever puzzles as the tape overlaps and twists in creative ways. The gameplay is easy to learn but gradually becomes more engaging as levels increase in complexity.

Featuring calming animations, playful colors, and intuitive controls, Tape Tap! is perfect for both quick breaks and long, stress-free play sessions. Whether you love sorting puzzles, satisfying unwrap mechanics, or light and casual gameplay, this game offers a soothing puzzle jam you can enjoy anytime.

Unwrap every box, solve every tape twist, and become the true tape sort master!

apps.title: Last Furry: Survival
apps.summary:
A cataclysmic conspiracy has released toxic fog over the once-vibrant planet Furry, plunging it into apocalyptic chaos. Many have perished, while others mutated into savage monsters. The remaining survivors now fight for their lives in this toxic wasteland — with scarce resources, suffocating air, and relentless beast attacks.

As Commander, YOU are destined to lead these survivors. Your strategic prowess and unyielding courage will be crucial in establishing a shelter, purifying the land, and combating the spreading toxic fog. Rally your people to rebuild civilization from the ashes and conquer the ultimate survival challenge!

[Game Features]

BUILD & MANAGE YOUR SHELTER
Transform ruins into a thriving refuge! Every decision counts—manage food supplies, purify toxic air, provide medical care, and fortify against threats. Your strategic planning and resource management will decide if your shelter flourishes or falls under the toxic fog.

LIVING, BREATHING SURVIVORS
Each survivor brings unique emotions, backstories, and personalities to your shelter. They'll show joy when comfortable, despair when hungry, and gratitude when protected. Through personal letters and dynamic interactions, you'll resolve conflicts, earn loyalty, and create unbreakable bonds with those you protect.

HIGH-STAKES EXPLORATION
Venture beyond safety into the toxic unknown! Lead squads to gather vital resources and salvage forgotten technologies. But beware—mutated beasts and hostile factions lurk in the toxic fog, making every exploration a high-risk, high-reward venture.

RECRUIT TALENTED HEROES
Find and recruit remarkable heroes with unique abilities! Build an elite team of specialists—fearsome warriors who excel in combat, brilliant engineers who boost development, and mysterious figures with powers that can change fate itself. Upgrade their gear, enhance their skills, and unleash their full potential!

FORM POWERFUL ALLIANCE
Survival requires unity! Create alliances to trade essential resources, share critical intelligence, and stand together against formidable threats. Join forces with other Commanders to push back the toxic fog and reclaim your broken world.

ENDLESS CHALLENGES
Encounter constantly evolving threats that demand your leadership! Plan explorations, develop purification strategies, issue impactful decrees, and tackle unexpected crises. Every decision shapes not just survival, but the future of civilization itself.

The toxic fog still chokes the land, but hope refuses to die.

Commander, will you lead humanity into a new dawn?

Download now and fight for the future!

Welcome to the official social media page of Last Furry to discover more exciting content:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lastfurrysurvival
Discord: https://discord.gg/EQb6jk7HNX
Email: lastfurry@staruniongame.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lastfurrysurvival/

apps.summary:
Billions of players can’t be wrong - run and jump back into the beloved world of Subway Surfers and rediscover your favorite endless running adventure with exciting new twists. Progress through fresh hurdles, reach new heights, and collect new characters!

Jake, Tricky, Fresh, and Yutani are ready - are you? Play Subway Surfers City now!

Key features:
- CHOOSE YOUR ADVENTURE: Switch seamlessly between thrilling endless runs chasing a new high score, or playing the all new City Tour!
- UNCOVER SECRETS: Stomp and jump for a new way to play this runner game. Reach new depths and heights as you discover hard-to-reach Secret Stars!
- COLLECT AND UPGRADE SURFERS & BOARDS: Each Surfer and Board has unique abilities, so upgrade and combine runners and boards to play your way! Collect them all, find Surfer and Board tokens to upgrade them all and build the strongest Crew!
- WIN WITH NEW POWER-UPS & PERKS: Pick up new power-ups for the most powerful runs. Bubblegum shields you, batteries superpower your hoverboard, and drones get you to the highest points of Subway City!
- UNLOCK LIVELY DISTRICTS: Explore all the secret corners of Subway City while running away from Guard and Dog. Earn XP to unlock new Districts!
- COMPLETE MISSIONS AND WIN REWARDS: The crew needs you to run your best! Play smart and finish missions to unlock new items and win big.
- CONQUER TRIALS: Are you ready to have your running skills challenged? Trials are adrenaline-pumping, limited runs that require your best performance to get the best rewards.
- PLAY OFFLINE: Subway Surfers City is available offline! Play without wifi or internet connection. Access to some features will be limited.

Download Subway Surfers City now and play for free! Some in-game items can also be purchased for real money.

- Anyone who enjoys thinking and planning moves

- Gamers wanting something relaxing yet challenging

apps.title: BALL x PIT
apps.summary:
BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

apps.title: NightClub Simulator
apps.summary:
Nightclub Simulator is the official mobile version of the original Nightclub Simulator game, carefully adapted for mobile devices while preserving its core gameplay, atmosphere, and story.

Step inside a living nightclub where nightlife is unpredictable and intense. Experience the energy of the dance floor, sudden conflicts, and fast-paced encounters in this night club game that blends action, fighting, and immersive club environments.

Club Fights and Confrontations

Nightclub Simulator focuses on action-driven gameplay set inside a nightclub.

Engage in close combat and fast-paced fights

React to aggressive situations as they escalate

Face different enemy behaviors and confrontation scenarios

Survive intense encounters inside the club

This club fighting game challenges your reflexes and decision-making every night.

Dance and Nightlife Atmosphere

The club is alive around you.

Dance on the floor

Interact with characters

Feel the rhythm and energy of the nightlife

Dynamic environments and crowd reactions

This is a nightclub simulator centered on movement, interaction, and immersion.

Story Line Progression

The game features a story-driven experience that unfolds as you progress.
Your actions, fights, and encounters reveal a narrative shaped by nightlife drama, rivalry, and escalating conflict.

Spawn and Angry Modes

Test your skills in additional game modes:

Spawn mode - continuous waves of opponents

Angry modes - heightened aggression, faster pace, and increased intensity

These modes push your combat and reaction skills to the limit.

Official Mobile Version

This release is the official mobile version of Nightclub Simulator, created as a direct adaptation of the original game and optimized for mobile controls and performance. It delivers a unique mix of action, atmosphere, and storytelling as an action simulator set inside a nightclub.

Optimized for Mobile Play

Touch-friendly controls

Smooth performance on mobile devices

Designed for both short sessions and longer play

Authentic nightclub visuals and sound design

Why Nightclub Simulator?

Official Nightclub Simulator mobile version

Action-focused nightclub simulator

Fighting, dancing, and story combined

Multiple modes and dynamic gameplay

Immersive nightlife atmosphere

Enter the club.
Face the tension.
Live the night.

Download Nightclub Simulator and experience the official mobile version of nightlife action.

apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

*****
Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.
This game is free to play but does contain in-app purchases. If you run into any issues while playing or you have any suggestions, please reach out to us at support@runaway.zendesk.com

apps.title: Immortal Clan: Grandmastery
apps.summary:
Immortal Clan: Grandmastery is an Eastern fantasy xiuxian simulation and management mobile game. Your journey takes place in a fantastical world ripped from the pages of a xiuxian novel. As the founding master, you will build your own sect from scratch. You will recruit disciples with distinct personalities and quirks, assign them to daily production tasks and guide their cultivation. Under your guidance, they will eventually transcend mortality and ascend to immortality. In this world, every character has the potential to be the protagonist. Best of all, resources could be passed down without any cost, ensuring an easy and fun cultivation experience!

Build your own sect from scratch
· Begin by claiming a wild, untamed mountain and building your sect with your bare hands.
· From building facilities and planning the overall layout of hundreds of constructions, you have total control over shaping the sect's destiny.
· Planting, mining, alchemy, crafting and all sorts of production yield help your sect flourish.

An Orthodox Xiuxian World of Eastern Fantasy
· Stepping into the grand world of eastern Xiuxian, you will take on the role of the sect's founding master and forge your path to becoming an unfading legend.
· The interplay of rival sects, untangled forces, and mysterious rifts creates a deeply immersive Xiuxian world.
· Dispatch your disciples across the world to explore ancient rifts, gather rare artifacts, and encounter the unknown.

A Highly Customized Disciple Cultivation System
· In this Xiuxian world, every disciple is a unique individual with distinct appearance, personality, quirks, and destiny.
· Disciples were shaped by their own traits: some were born fighters, while others excel at daily productions. The sect thrives only when you match each disciple's strengths to their perfect role.
· Even the most unassuming disciple could be of vital assistance if placed wisely. It all depends on your discerning eye.

A Choice-Driven Cultivation Process
· Cultivation is more than just stacking stats. In this game, you get to forge a completely unique path by experimenting with countless combinations of Techniques and Skills.
· There is no single set path. Guide your disciples to choose their own destiny—whether they walk the righteous Immortal Way or the ruthless Demonic Way.
· Progress need not be a grind. With the Impartation system, disciples can master new Techniques without losing hard-earned cultivation, eliminating the burden of starting over.

Fight for the Sect
· The law of the jungle reigns here! When conflict becomes inevitable, you must lead your disciples into battle against all foes.
· Forge alliances with other players in this vast Xiuxian world. Your strategic choices will shape not only your sect's destiny but also the fate of others.
· Battle roaming demonic monsters, powerful world bosses, rival sects, and the hidden forces of the dark demon realm.
· Every victory brings glorious rewards—rare items, Artifacts and Gear. Fight for the glory of the sect!

apps.title: Fluvsies Academy - Kids Games
apps.summary:
TOP LEARNING EXPERIENCE FOR KIDS
Fluvsies Academy is a safe and fun educational app that kids love and parents can trust. Created with child development experts, it turns digital play into smart learning time that helps preschoolers grow confident minds, curious hearts, and healthy habits.

SCREEN TIME YOU CAN FEEL GOOD ABOUT
• Designed hand-in-hand with child psychologists.
• Perfect for the early learning needs of preschoolers (ages 3–7).
• 100% safe, ad-free, and age-appropriate.
• Each game strengthens focus, creativity, and real-world skills – giving your kids fun that truly develops the mind.
• You can finally feel confident knowing every moment they play helps them learn, grow, and thrive.

HOLISTIC GROWTH
Your kids can explore all their favorite subjects – from language, ABC’s, math, and logic, to real-world skills and creative play. Two learning modes support holistic growth:
• Active learning: engages focus, problem-solving, and reasoning to develop early academic skills.
• Passive learning: introduces real-world professions through relaxing, imaginative, and interactive stories.
Age-appropriate challenges adapt to preschoolers’ pace, so learning always feels just right.
REAL-WORLD LEARNING
Through playful activities, kids practice everyday skills like brushing their teeth, helping at the store, cooking, sorting, counting, and more. They learn independence, explore how the world works, and develop habits that lay the foundation for lifelong learning.

EMOTIONAL BALANCE
Fluvsies Academy creates a calm, nurturing space for emotional growth. Children build social skills, practice staying focused, and learn to self-regulate – all through gentle, guided play that’s balanced and never overwhelming.

FUN LEARNING KIDS ACTUALLY ENJOY
Learning feels natural when it’s this fun! Kids explore a colorful world they intuitively understand and play alongside characters they already adore. Meanwhile, you can feel confident knowing every game is part of a research-backed learning journey, with purpose behind every tap.

apps.title: Titan Rush
apps.summary:
The tides swallowed up civilization, and Chimera tore apart our homes. The world fell silent, and hope sank beneath the waves. Survivors, welcome to the last refuge—an underwater base. Though it appears run down, it provides safety; though scarce, it contains life. Repair equipment, restart the power, and establish a food supply—Provide a spark of hope for humanity in this refuge. In the depths of the base, a slumbering Titan awaits your awakening—it will become humanity's greatest weapon in its fight to retake the planet, the last guardian in this apocalypse.

[Rebuilding the Base: From Survival to New Life]
Utilize every inch of space and restart the old equipment. From basic power generation to sustainable underwater farms, from residential expansion to military production, every step of progress is crucial for survival. Strategically design your base layout, research post-apocalyptic technology, increase resource production, and build a fortress made for survival in the abyss.

[Repair the Titan: Deep-Sea Blade, Born for Battle] Repair the dormant Titan and unlock multiple weapon systems—high-energy torpedoes, pulse cannons, deep-diving slashing blades… Combine and match equipment to fit your playstyle. Push the limits of your Titan in actual combat. Overwhelm hordes of Chimera with massive firepower, enhance mobility and defense, and prepare for the giant Chimera to attack at any time!

[Commander Rally: Female Commanders in Position]
In the apocalypse, you must look everywhere for assistance. There are logistics commanders skilled in resource management, combat commanders skilled in tactics, engineers specialized in Titan development... Each commander brings different upgrades to both the base and your Titan. Match their skills to build an elite team with survivability and combat prowess. Work together to forge a future amidst the abyss and ruins.

[Explore the Ruins: Dive into the Depths and Rediscover Civilization] A sunken city lies beneath the turbulent waves, holding treasures from before the apocalyptic. Organize expedition teams to infiltrate the dangerous ruins. Search for lost energy cores, scarce survival supplies, and lost technological blueprints… Every exploration could uncover the secrets to turning the tides of battle, or it may turn into a surprise attack from deep-sea monsters; High-risk, high-reward.

[Alliance Benefits: Growing Together] In the apocalypse, a lone boat will struggle to survive. Join or create an Alliance to share technology and resources, and coordinate defenses with your fellow survivors. Participate in Alliance Missions, fight against the giant Chimera, and unite to control strategic deep-sea areas. You no longer face the darkness alone—together we will form humanity's strongest line of defense against the abyss.

>>Download now and return to the last refuge of humanity<<

apps.title: Rainbow Six Mobile
apps.summary:
From the acclaimed Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six franchise, Rainbow Six Mobile is a competitive online tactical action shooter FPS built specifically for online mobile action. Engage in intense 5v5 multiplayer FPS matches inspired by Rainbow Six Siege’s iconic Attack vs. Defense gameplay. Alternate roles every round as you play Attacker or Defender in fast-paced online combat. Experience close-quarter shooter action where teamwork, positioning, and map knowledge make the difference. Choose from a roster of elite Operators from Rainbow Six Siege, each designed for action tactical team play with unique abilities and gadgets. Every map offers new strategic possibilities, demanding coordination, precision, and smart decisions.

Rainbow Six Mobile delivers a true FPS action shooter experience, adapted for mobile platforms.

MOBILE ADAPTATION – Rainbow Six Mobile has been developed and optimized for mobile devices, delivering smooth online gameplay, intuitive controls, and shorter 5v5 FPS matches. Customize your HUD, adjust controls to your playstyle, and jump into tactical combat anywhere, anytime. This mobile shooter supports responsive touch controls and controller compatibility for competitive action on the go.

RAINBOW SIX EXPERIENCE – Experience the authentic Rainbow Six Siege on mobile. Play on legendary maps such as Bank, Clubhouse, Border, Oregon, and Villa. Each map is designed for tactical team coordination and intense 5v5 online combat. Squad up with friends and players worldwide in thrilling multiplayer action FPS battles.

TACTICAL SHOOTER GAME – Rainbow Six Mobile, like Rainbow Six Siege, is an action-tactical shooter focused on realistic combat. Clear angles, gather intel with drones and cameras, and adapt your strategy to every map. Smart decisions, teamwork, and preparation are essential to dominate this online action FPS.

DESTRUCTIBLE ENVIRONMENTS – Use destruction to your advantage in close-quarter combat. Break walls, doors, and hatches to reshape the map and create new tactical opportunities. Every map becomes a dynamic battlefield where strategy and action collide in intense shooter gameplay.

STRATEGIC TEAM-BASED PVP – Strategy and teamwork are the keys to success in Rainbow Six Mobile. Adapt your strategy to each map, role, and situation in competitive 5v5 online combat. Attackers gather intel and breach defenses, while Defenders fortify positions and control the map. True tactical action shooter gameplay rewards communication and planning.

SPECIALIZED OPERATORS – Build your team with highly trained Operators from Rainbow Six Siege. Each Operator brings unique weapons, gadgets, and abilities to the battlefield. Mastering Operators is key to success in this competitive online shooter.

NEW MONTHLY SEASON – Every month, discover new action with fresh Operators, Battle Pass content, limited-time online modes, events, and cosmetics. Keep your team ready for evolving combat challenges across new and familiar maps.

This game requires an online connection (4G, 5G, or Wi-Fi).

apps.title: Murderhill
apps.summary:
Murderhill: Horror Escape is a cool mix of mystery adventure games and survival horror games in one unrivaled experience. Break things around, get resources, upgrade weapons, and fight against shadows to survive the night in the woods.

A place that used to host parties in the forest suddenly became a mysterious Occult location. All residents and guests disappeared without a trace and our main character needs to solve the mystery of the silent night. However, challenges and various mystical creatures will appear in the way, so the main goal is to survive the night in the mystery adventure games.

🔍 EXPLORE NEW LANDS

Explore the abandoned places of Murderhill, find out why the beautiful place turned into an endless night in the woods. Meet the scary details of survival horror games around: blood trails, dark portals, large footprints and unusual shadows watching you.

🪓 SURVIVAL RPG WITH CRAFT

Break things around you for resources, and craft new tools and weapons. The better your outfit, the easier it will be to survive the night in this dangerous survival horror games.

🔮 IMPROVE YOUR RUNES

Find an ancient book in the middle of a mystery house and learn ancient occult magic with runes. Search for runes in Murderhill of different rarities and upgrade your characteristics. Without this power, it will be difficult for you to fight in survival horror games.

👤 BECOME THE SHADOW HUNTER

Pistol, machine gun or magical powers? Choose and upgrade your weapon from a devastating arsenal of survival RPG. Use different fighting styles to destroy monsters of mystery adventure games.

🚧 CLEAR RAIDS

Go on dangerous raids for important resources and powerful runes. Each raid is a unique challenge! Unusual locations with enemies at every turn await you. Maybe you can solve the occult mystery of this horror survival games.

👫 SAVE OTHER SURVIVORS

In this survival RPG it is important to join forces to confront the darkness. Save other survivors by making horror escape on this silent night and protecting them from the shadows while they fortify their shelter. Go with them for resources and hunt for shadows and bosses.

🪵 PREPARE FOR THE NIGHT

In Murderhill: Mystery Adventure Games, when the silent night falls and the light is replaced by darkness, you will need all your survival skills to horror escape from the Forest Guest and other scary monsters.

🕵️ SOLVE THE MYSTERY

Search for letters and various clues to learn about the history of this mysterious village. Find the key to solving what happened in the forest and why all this horror escape began.

In Murderhill: Horror Survival Games, every dark moment is a desperate struggle to survive the night and face the terrifying unknown. Explore dark forests and abandoned houses in one of the most intense survival horror games and mystery adventure games. Solve puzzles, horror escape deadly traps and survive the night while something watches from the shadows. Every night in the woods hides new dangers, and even a silent night can conceal terrifying secrets.

Murderhill: Horror Escape is a free-to-play survival rpg experience where every decision matters. Search for clues, uncover the truth behind the haunted town, and test your courage in one of the most chilling survival horror games. Only the bravest players will manage to survive the night in this dark world of mystery adventure games.

👤 BECOME THE SHADOW HUNTER  

Pistol, machine gun or magical powers? Choose and upgrade your weapon from a devastating arsenal of survival RPG. Use different fighting styles to destroy monsters of mystery adventure games.  

🚧 CLEAR RAIDS  

Go on dangerous raids for important resources and powerful runes. Each raid is a unique challenge! Unusual locations with enemies at every turn await you. Maybe you can solve the occult mystery of this horror survival games.  

👫 SAVE OTHER SURVIVORS  

In this survival RPG it is important to join forces to confront the darkness. Save other survivors by making horror escape on this silent night and protecting them from the shadows while they fortify their shelter. Go with them for resources and hunt for shadows and bosses.  

🪵 PREPARE FOR THE NIGHT  

In Murderhill: Mystery Adventure Games, when the silent night falls and the light is replaced by darkness, you will need all your survival skills to horror escape from the Forest Guest and other scary monsters.  

🕵️ SOLVE THE MYSTERY

Search for letters and various clues to learn about the history of this mysterious village. Find the key to solving what happened in the forest and why all this horror escape began.  

In Murderhill: Horror Survival Games, every dark moment is a desperate struggle to survive the night and face the terrifying unknown. Explore dark forests and abandoned houses in one of the most intense survival horror games and mystery adventure games. Solve puzzles, horror escape deadly traps and survive the night while something watches from the shadows. Every night in the woods hides new dangers, and even a silent night can conceal terrifying secrets.  

Murderhill: Horror Escape is a free-to-play survival rpg experience where every decision matters. Search for clues, uncover the truth behind the haunted town, and test your courage in one of the most chilling survival horror games. Only the bravest players will manage to survive the night in this dark world of mystery adventure games.

apps.title: Baseball Hits 26
apps.summary:
Baseball Hits 26 is an officially licensed MLB Players, Inc. Game.

⚾PLAY WITH MLBPI SUPERSTARS. ANYTIME, ANYWHERE.
Enter the ballpark, step up to the plate, and experience the thrill of real baseball, officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Collect and play with today’s biggest baseball superstars in an easy-to-learn, deeply satisfying mobile baseball game built for fans.

🎮EASY TO PLAY. HARD TO PUT DOWN.
Tap to swing, time it right, and send it deep. Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

🧢BUILD YOUR DREAM LINEUP WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

Mix current MLBPI legends with top-ranked rising stars like Jackson Holliday, power-hitting breakout talents like Junior Caminero, and postseason breakout arms like Trey Yesavage to craft the ultimate roster. Level them up, and climb through competitive tiers to prove your lineup belongs among the elite.

🏆COMPETE AND WIN TOGETHER
Join a Club to connect with other fans, chat, and compete through live events and tournaments. Work as a team to earn rewards, climb leaderboards, and rule the diamond. Every win counts, and clubs win bigger together, so go ahead and beat your baseball rivals.

SHORT SESSIONS. BIG MOMENTS.
Designed for mobile, Baseball Hits 26 fits perfectly into your day. Play a quick inning on break or battle through all 9 innings in a full playoff run at night! The pace is fast, the action believable, and every at-bat matters. Play your way:
⚾Hits Mode: Step into the batter's box and lead your team to victory
🔥Pitching Ace: Aim, release, and fool batters with perfect timing
💥Total Baseball: Hit and pitch for the full baseball experience
👑Homerun King: Pure power-hitting fun with streak bonuses
🏆Events & Tournaments: Time-limited challenges with exclusive rewards!

BEAT YOUR BASEBALL RIVALS. CLIMB THE RANKS. BUILD YOUR LEGACY.
Rise from rookie to legend as you progress through tiers, unlock powerful baseball superstars, and chase special edition stars that celebrate the best in the game. Earn reward boxes, collect currency, and keep improving season after season.

A LIVING BASEBALL WORLD WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
With ongoing live events, player drops, and new content year-round, Baseball Hits 26 is more than a baseball game; it’s your home for authentic baseball action on mobile. Every update brings new challenges, new baseball stars, and new reasons to play.

KEY FEATURES:
⚾Officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Real players and real stats
☝️Simple tap-to-swing and tap-to-pitch gameplay
💥Authentic baseball physics and motion-captured animations
📈Deep roster-building and player progression
🏆Clubs, leaderboards, and live competitions
💎Free-to-play with optional in-app purchases

Baseball Hits 26 is EASY to play, FUN to master, and BUILT FOR BASEBALL FANS.⚾

apps.title: Ice Haven
apps.summary:
The world as we knew it has ended. A catastrophic freeze swept across the planet, bringing civilization to its knees. From the frozen ruins, the dead began to rise, driven by an insatiable hunger and immune to the cold that kills the living. Now, scattered groups of survivors drift across the icy wasteland, scavenging for resources and fighting to see another dawn. In this brutal new world where warmth is precious and trust is rare, only the strongest and wisest leaders will endure.

As the leader of a small settlement adrift on a floating ice platform, you must rescue survivors, recruit powerful heroes, and build a stronghold capable of withstanding both the relentless cold and the zombie hordes that threaten to consume everything.

Ice Haven is a game of survival, strategy, and determination. Every decision shapes your settlement's fate and your people's hope for the future. Will you focus on fortifying your defenses against the zombie sieges, or will you venture into the frozen wilderness to uncover the secrets behind the apocalypse? Do you have what it takes to become humanity's last hope?

GAME FEATURES

Build a Floating Ice Fortress: Construct and upgrade a variety of survival facilities on your drifting ice platform. Manage resources, maintain warmth, and create a thriving refuge that stands as a beacon of hope in the apocalypse.

Rescue and House Survivors: Venture into the frozen wasteland to rescue stranded survivors. Bring them back to your settlement, where they will contribute their skills to help your community grow and prosper against all odds.

Recruit Legendary Heroes: Gather a roster of powerful heroes among the hardened soldiers, resourceful scouts, brilliant engineers, and more. Promote and equip them with specialized equipment to lead your forces to victory.

Defend Against the Undead: Fortify your defenses and repel waves of zombie attacks. Deploy defensive structures, plan tactical formations, and protect your people from the endless hordes that emerge from the blizzard.

Forge Powerful Alliances: Team up with players worldwide to form unbreakable coalitions. Share resources, coordinate large-scale attacks, and defend each other's territories in epic real-time PvP warfare.


SPECIAL NOTES

· Network connection is required.
· Privacy Policy: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/
· Terms of Use: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/terms_of_use

apps.title: Dora: Explore and Play!
apps.summary:
¡Hola! Is your child ready for an adventure?
Join Dora and her friends in an interactive journey that brings the magic of the hit show right to your fingertips!
Designed specifically for toddlers, preschool and younger kids, this app combines the joy of exploration with essential early childhood learning.

Explore & Discover
Adventure across vibrant and iconic locations!
From the Dora's Casita to the Tallest Mountain, there’s always something new to find.
Your child will develop curiosity and problem solving skills as they navigate through beautiful, interactive environments filled with hidden surprises.

Learn Through Play
We believe the best way to learn is by having fun! Our app is packed with mini-games that encourage:
Language Learning: Intro to basic Spanish vocabulary and phrases.
Problem Solving: Helping Dora find the best path forward.
Creative Imagination: Activities that let children's minds run wild.
Shapes and Colors: Simple counting and shape-matching challenges.

Help Friends & Build Empathy
It’s not an adventure without friends! Join Boots, Tico, Isa and Benny on their missions.
By helping Dora's friends overcome obstacles, your child will learn the importance of kindness, teamwork, and social-emotional skills.

Music & Interactive Activities
Get ready to move! Featuring musical activities, children can engage with the rhythm and sounds of Dora’s world.
The gameplay is easy to play and designed for small hands, ensuring a frustration-free experience for even the youngest explorers.

Bringing the Show to Life
This isn't just a game, it’s an immersive Dora experience.
We’ve captured the core pillars of the show: interactivity, bilingual education, and adventurous spirit. It’s like being inside an episode!

Why Parents Love It:
Safe & Kid-Friendly: Designed with child safety in mind.
Educational Foundation: Developed to support preschool milestones.

ABOUT DORA
Since its launch on Nickelodeon in 2000, Dora the Explorer quickly emerged as a global pop-culture phenomenon and, nearly 25 years later, remains one of the most-watched preschool shows of all time. Dora has crossed social, racial, and language boundaries and stands as a hero and friend to millions of children around the world. The series currently is seen in more than 150 countries and territories and translated in 32 languages through Nickelodeon channels, Paramount+ around the globe, YouTube and YouTube Kids.

ABOUT BUDGE STUDIOS
Budge Studios was founded in 2010 with the mission to entertain and educate boys and girls around the world, through innovation, creativity and fun. Its high-quality app portfolio consists of original and branded properties, including Dora, Disney Frozen, Bluey, Barbie, PAW Patrol, Hot Wheels, Thomas & Friends, Transformers, My Little Pony, Strawberry Shortcake, Miraculous, Caillou, The Smurfs, Miss Hollywood, Hello Kitty and Crayola.

SUBSCRIPTION DETAILS
- This app may offer monthly or yearly subscriptions
- Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period
- Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase
- Your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period
- You can cancel your subscription at any time.

PRIVACY & ADVERTISING
This application has received the “ESRB Privacy Certified Kids’ Privacy Seal”.
https://budgestudios.com/en/legal/privacy-policy/

END-USER LICENSE AGREEMENT
https://budgestudios.com/en/legal-embed/eula/

HAVE QUESTIONS?
We always welcome your questions, suggestions and comments. Contact us 24/7 at support@budgestudios.ca

© 2026 Viacom International Inc. All Rights Reserved. Nickelodeon, Dora and all related titles, logos and characters are trademarks of Viacom International Inc.
© 2025 Budge Studios Inc. All Rights Reserved.

apps.title: Wordington Solitaire
apps.summary:
Solitaire Associations with a Story

Join Emma on her emotional and unforgettable journey in Wordington Solitaire! Help her renovate her grandfather's beautiful old house and restore it to its former glory—while experiencing a story filled with secrets, friendship, and romance.
The old house and garden are in desperate need of a complete renovation, and Emma can't do it alone. To progress through the story, you'll play engaging levels of Solitaire Associations. By connecting cards and completing levels, you earn stars that unlock new chapters of the story, new rooms to renovate, and hidden mysteries from Emma's past.
Behind every door, new surprises await.

Wordington Solitaire includes:
- Unique Solitaire Associations gameplay: Connect cards in clever ways and complete levels to move forward in the story.
- Renovation & interior design: Create your dream home by choosing from a variety of design options for every room.
- A captivating story: Follow Emma's journey as she uncovers secrets her grandfather left behind.
- Colorful characters: Meet Pizza David, Handy Bob, and many more. Could there be a little romance blossoming between Emma and David...?
- An adorable pet: Meet the sweet dog Max and discover the adventures he brings along.

Explore bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, the garden, and much more. You're in full control of how the house will look—every choice you make shapes the final result. Choose from a wide selection of furniture, decorations, and styles to create a home that truly feels personal.
No stress—just engaging solitaire levels, creative design, and a story that unfolds with every step you take.
As soon as you complete your first level in Wordington Solitaire, Emma's journey to transform the old house into a true dream home begins.
Connect the cards. Unlock the story. Transform the house.

The adventure starts now.

apps.title: DISSIDIA DUELLUM FINAL FANTASY
apps.summary:
Warriors from the FINAL FANTASY (FF) series assemble in modern-day Tokyo to save the world from destruction in DISSIDIA DUELLUM FINAL FANTASY.

Fight in 3-versus-3 battles where two teams fight monsters and clash in a race to defeat the powerful boss faster than the enemy team!

■ LEGENDARY FF CHARACTERS
Fight as one of several legendary FF warriors like Warrior of Light, Cloud, Lightning, and more, and take on the role of either Melee, Ranged, Agile, or Support. Choose the character that matches your playstyle and work as a team to take on powerful monsters!
※ More characters will be added over a period of time.

■ EXHILARATING ACTION
Acquire various abilities and unleash them in battle to gain the upper hand.
Customize your loadout from an array of abilities, including numerous newly drawn illustrations by a stellar team of artists.

■ EASY-TO-LEARN CONTROLS
Play with simple controls anywhere and on-the-go!
Change the control scheme to one that suits you best from various control settings.

■ MODERN STORY
Explore a new DISSIDIA story unfolding in modern-day Tokyo with FINAL FANTASY warriors brought to life with full Japanese voice acting and beautiful cel-shaded graphics. Get a glimpse into their daily lives and interactions with one another by watching chat messenger episodes.

■ CUSTOMIZATION & COMMUNITY
Show off your style by outfitting FINAL FANTASY characters in their original looks or new clothes fit to roam around the modern world!
Collect original and arranged music tracks from your favorite FF games, edit your profile, chat with other players, and join the ultimate FINAL FANTASY community!

[OS Version]
OS: Android 10.0 or higher, 2GB RAM or more
Depending on your device specifications, some in-game video content may not work properly.


Follow us for the latest information:
Official Site: https://www.square-enix.com/ddff/en/
Official X: https://x.com/DDFF_EN

© SQUARE ENIX/NHN PlayArt
CHARACTER DESIGN: MIKI YAMASHITA / TETSUYA NOMURA

apps.title: Magical Girls: Dress Up Game
apps.summary:
✨ New Description for Magical Girls: Dress Up Game

👑 Magical Girls: Dress Up Game is the ultimate princess dress up and fashion makeover experience! Step into a magical world where you can dress up princess dolls, design stylish outfits, and show your fashion star skills in exciting style competition challenges. With endless makeup, hairstyle, and outfits choices, every girl can become a true royal queen in this anime-inspired makeover simulation!

FASHION & DRESS UP CUSTOMIZATION
Create your own princess doll with unlimited dress up options! Mix and match clothes, outfits, shoes, and accessories to design your cute magic girl. Choose makeup styles, change hairstyles, and give her the most trendy fashion look. With kawaii outfits and royal dresses, every girl can become a superstar model.

MAGIC MAKEOVER & BEAUTY GAMEPLAY
Enjoy a complete makeover simulation where you control every detail of your princess fashion. Apply makeup, style her hair, and select the most charming accessories. From spa treatments to royal shopping, you’ll unlock endless beauty items to make your magic queen shine like a true fashion star.

STYLE COMPETITION & RUNWAY SHOW
Enter the princess competition and show off your fashion outfits! Compete with other girls to see who is the most stylish princess. Walk the runway, earn rewards, and unlock more anime dress up items. Become the fashion superstar with your cute kawaii princess doll and dominate the royal style challenge.

ROYAL SHOPPING & TRENDY COLLECTIONS
Visit the royal shopping mall to find new clothes, shoes, makeup, and accessories. Upgrade your princess doll with the latest trendy fashion. From anime hairstyles to royal gowns, your magic girl will always be ahead in style and beauty. Collect luxury outfits and create the most stylish makeover looks!

🌈 FEATURES 🌈

👗 Endless dress up options with clothes, outfits, shoes, and accessories.

💄 Complete makeover simulation with makeup, hairstyle, and spa.

👸 Beautiful princess dolls and magic anime girls to customize.

⭐ Join fashion competition and shine like a superstar queen.

apps.title: 2248 Blast: Merge Puzzle
apps.summary:
A fresh take on classic number merge puzzles—designed to be simple, satisfying, and endlessly challenging.

2248 Blast: Merge Puzzle invites you into a world of number merging fun where strategy meets relaxation. Connect matching number blocks, merge them into higher values, and see how far your logic can take you. Easy to pick up, yet deeply rewarding to master, this is a puzzle game made for players who love clear goals and clever decisions.

How to Play

Your mission is simple: merge identical numbers to create bigger ones.
Swipe in any direction to connect matching blocks, trigger merges, and build higher-value tiles. Each move matters—plan carefully to keep the board alive and push toward impressive scores.

As the numbers grow, so does the challenge. Reaching higher values isn’t just about luck—it’s about smart positioning, forward thinking, and knowing when to take risks.

Why You’ll Love It

Eazy to learning, endlessly fun
Learn the basics in seconds, then enjoy hours of thoughtful puzzle-solving.

A calm yet challenging experience
No timers, no pressure—play at your own pace while sharpening your focus.

Pure number-merging satisfaction
Every successful merge feels rewarding, every high number earned feels deserved.

Game Features:

Intuitive swipe-and-merge controls

Clean, minimal visuals for distraction-free play

Smooth performance and responsive gameplay

Automatic progress saving

Global leaderboards to test your skills

No time limits—play whenever you want

Whether you’re aiming for your next personal best or simply enjoying the flow of merging numbers, 2248 Blast: Merge Puzzle delivers a relaxing yet strategic puzzle experience you can return to anytime.

Play and see how high you can climb in this addictive number merge adventure.

apps.title: Dice Tac Toe
apps.summary:
Tic Tac Toe evolved! Roll the dice, pick your spot, and outsmart your rivals.

Think you know Tic Tac Toe? Think again.

Dice-Tac-Toe takes the world’s most famous game and injects it with a high-stakes tactical twist. This isn’t just about making a line; it’s about managing luck, calculating risk, and mastering the roll of the dice.

Step onto the massive 6x6 grid and prepare for a battle where every move is a decision and every roll could change the game.

The Classic Game, Reimagined

Forget the 3x3 grid. In Dice-Tac-Toe, the board is bigger, the stakes are higher, and the strategy is deeper. You don't just place your mark—you ROLL for it.

Why You’ll Love Dice-Tac-Toe:
- Strategy Meets Luck: Roll two dice to determine your coordinates. Do you take the safe spot or Re-roll for a game-changing play?
- Deep Tactical Gameplay: Use the 6x6 grid to block your opponent, set up massive combos, and score multiple points in a single turn.
- Unique Power-Ups: Not happy with your roll? Use Re-rolls to turn a "Bust" into a victory.
- Meet Sophie: Let your pro guide, Sophie, show you the ropes before you head into competitive play.
- Compete & Conquer: Face off in fast-paced matches where the first to score 3 wins the glory.
- Progresion & Rewards: Level up, earn gems, and unlock exclusive content as you climb the ranks.

How to Play:
- Roll: Shake the dice to get your Row and Column numbers.
- Target: Find the intersection on the grid.
- Score: Complete a line of 3 to score a point.
- Win: Outmaneuver your opponent and be the first to reach 3 points!

Luck gives you the numbers. Strategy gives you the win.

Whether you’re a fan of classic board games or looking for a fresh puzzle challenge, Dice-Tac-Toe delivers endless replayability.

Roll the dice. Claim the grid. Download Dice-Tac-Toe today!

apps.title: Arrow Out: Line Puzzle
apps.summary:
Are you ready to test your logic? 👉 Tap to Release!

Welcome to Arrow Out: Line Puzzle, the addictive new brain teaser that challenges you to think outside the box! The board is jammed with tangled arrows, and it’s your job to help them escape.

How to Play:

Tap the arrows to move them forward in the direction they point.

Watch out! Arrows will stop if they hit another block.

Plan your moves: Find the right order to clear the screen without collisions.

Clear the level: Remove all arrows to win!

It starts easy, but as you progress, the puzzles become complex knots of logic that will put your IQ to the test. It’s like a traffic jam, but with satisfying, clean lines!

Key Features:

🧠 Brain-Training Gameplay: Hundreds of levels designed to sharpen your spatial reasoning and critical thinking.

👆 Simple Controls: Just tap to play! Easy to learn, but hard to master.

🎨 Clean & Relaxing: Minimalist design with smooth animations for a satisfying, stress-free experience.

🚀 Escalating Difficulty: From simple clear-outs to complex, multi-layered jams.

🚫 No Time Limits: Play at your own pace. Perfect for a quick break or a long commute.

Can you untangle the mess and clear the board? Download Arrow Out: Line Puzzle now and start tapping!

Clear the level: Remove all arrows to win!

It starts easy, but as you progress, the puzzles become complex knots of logic that will put your IQ to the test. It’s like a traffic jam, but with satisfying, clean lines!

Key Features:

🧠 Brain-Training Gameplay: Hundreds of levels designed to sharpen your spatial reasoning and critical thinking.

👆 Simple Controls: Just tap to play! Easy to learn, but hard to master.

🎨 Clean & Relaxing: Minimalist design with smooth animations for a satisfying, stress-free experience.

🚀 Escalating Difficulty: From simple clear-outs to complex, multi-layered jams.

🚫 No Time Limits: Play at your own pace. Perfect for a quick break or a long commute.

Can you untangle the mess and clear the board? Download Arrow Out: Line Puzzle now and start tapping!

apps.title: Jigsawcard Palace Gallery
apps.summary:
Jigsawcard Palace Gallery — Immersive Eastern Imperial Artifact Exhibition

Step into a treasure-filled world of ancient Eastern palaces! In Jigsawcard Palace Gallery, you will flip, slide, match, and assemble pieces to restore magnificent artifacts that carry centuries of history. This game beautifully blends the thoughtful challenge of traditional jigsaw puzzles with smooth card-swiping mechanics, while hidden stories on the back of each card reveal fascinating historical insights—offering a cultural journey that is both peaceful and intellectually engaging, merging memory skills with rich heritage.

How to Play:
- Just press and drag any cards anywhere
- Match & connect pieces to finish the puzzles
- Observe every details and plan your moves wisely to clear the board

Key Features:
- HD Artifacts: Porcelain, jade, calligraphy, bronze ware, and more—premium visuals bring Eastern palace treasures to life
- Satisfying Restoration: Experience the joy of piecing together multiple fragments into complete objects, just like a real conservator
- Hidden Historical Facts—Each card back holds a story or detail, creating a rewarding memory challenge that also educates
- No Time Limits, No Pressure—A relaxing experience suitable for all ages and skill levels
- Gradual Depth: Start with single artifacts and progress to full exhibition halls, with increasing complexity for seasoned players
- Unlock Themed Galleries: Ceramics Hall, Clock & Watch Pavilion, Painting Gallery… keep your journey fresh and inspiring

Perfect For:
- Fans of jigsaw puzzles, card-matching, and historical puzzles, or anyone who enjoys a creative blend of culture and gameplay
- Players looking for a relaxing yet deeply rewarding pastime with a sense of accomplishment
- Those who appreciate beautiful visuals and want to engage their minds while exploring Eastern imperial artistry

Jigsawcard Palace Gallery is more than a game—it’s a hands-on restoration of history, a moment of mindful calm, and a celebration of timeless Eastern craftsmanship. Flip, slide, and connect exquisite artifact fragments to feel the warmth of history and complete your own cultural exhibition, one gentle tap at a time.

Download now and join a global community of puzzle and culture lovers in this beautifully crafted fusion of jigsaw challenge and historical discovery!

apps.summary:
Flip the Tiles. Master the Dice. Can You Shut the Box?
A classic strategy dice game — reimagined for mobile with fast matches, satisfying tile flips, and high-stakes decision-making.

Close them all to SHUT THE BOX — but one unlucky roll can end your turn.

✨ Satisfying dice rolls and tile flip animations

apps.title: Heavenly Guitars
apps.summary:
『千本桜(黒うさP)』『ROSIER(LUNA SEA)』『残酷な天使のテーゼ(高橋洋子)』『ギミチョコ！！ /(BABYMETAL)』など、名曲を収録！
エレキギターの「弾く楽しさ」を極限まで追求した、対戦型音楽ゲーム。 リアルなサウンド、直感的な操作、そして熱いオンラインバトル。世界中のギタリストと対戦しよう！

▼楽曲リスト (一部)
千本桜 / 黒うさP
ROSIER / LUNA SEA
G線上のアリア/バッハ
ピアノソナタ 月光/ベートーヴェン
ギミチョコ！！ / BABYMETAL
残酷な天使のテーゼ / 高橋洋子
The Beginning / ONE OK ROCK
and more... 今後も続々追加予定！

ようこそ、あなたの音が世界を熱狂させる瞬間へ！
ギターを愛するすべての人へ贈る、究極のリアルタイム音楽バトル『Heavenly Guitars』がついに登場！

『Heavenly Guitars』は、ギター演奏の楽しさや情熱をとことん追求した新感覚の音楽ゲーム。世界中のプレイヤーとオンラインでリアルタイムに対戦し、熱く盛り上がる演奏バトルを楽しめます。複雑な操作や専門知識は一切不要。初心者からギター熟練者まで、誰でも直感的かつシンプルな操作で、本物のライブステージに立っているような臨場感を気軽に味わえます。

▼世界中のプレイヤーと白熱のリアルタイムギターバトル！
最大の魅力は、世界中のプレイヤーとリアルタイムで競い合えること。あなた自身のギターテクニックや、細部まで作り込んだオリジナルエフェクト、そして相手を攻略するための巧みな戦略を駆使し、ライバルとの白熱したバトルに挑戦しましょう。
勝利を重ねるほど、世界ランキングを駆け上がることができ、トッププレイヤーとしての名誉と栄光を掴む絶好のチャンスです！さらに、対戦相手が演奏している間にもあなたの戦略は無限に広がります。エフェクターを活用して、演出を盛り上げたりするなど、まるでライブ会場さながらの臨場感あふれる駆け引きを楽しめます。
戦いの中で新たなライバルとの出会いや目標を見つけ、自身の成長を実感しましょう。挑戦と成長の連続が、あなたを究極のギタリストへと導きます。

▼爽快感抜群のゲームシステム
収録されている楽曲はすべて、エレキギター専用に作られた本格的な譜面で構成されており、まるで自分が伝説のギタリストになったかのような感覚で演奏を楽しむことができます。
正確なプレイによる華麗なコンボや、エフェクターやギタリストのパフォーマンスでオーディエンスを魅了しましょう。観客の熱狂度を示す「オーディエンスゲージ」を最大まで高めれば、バトルの勝利を掴むことができます。あなたの演奏で世界を驚かせ、熱狂させましょう！

▼無限の可能性を秘めたギターカスタマイズ＆エフェクターシステム
自分だけの特別なギターを自由自在に作り上げることができます。ボディカラーや個性的なステッカーを施す外見のカスタマイズはもちろん、ピックアップやブリッジなど細かなパーツの変更で、世界に一つだけの理想的ギタービジュアルを追求しましょう。
さらにあなたが創り上げたギターは世界に一つだけの特別なアイテムとなり、コミュニティ内で高い価値を持つようになります。オリジナリティ溢れるギターを手に、個性的でインパクトあるパフォーマンスを披露し、世界の舞台へ飛び立ちましょう！

さあ、『Heavenly Guitars』を通じて、世界を震わせる最高のギタリストを目指そう。あなたの音が世界を変える、その瞬間がここにあります！
apps.description:
Featuring classics like "Senbonzakura (Kuro Usa-P)," "ROSIER (LUNA SEA)," "A Cruel Angel's Thesis (Yoko Takahashi)," and "Gimme Chocolate!! (BABYMETAL)"!
This competitive music game maximizes the joy of playing the electric guitar. Experience realistic sound, intuitive controls, and exciting online battles. Compete against guitarists from around the world!

▼Song List (Partial)
Senbonzakura / Kuro Usa-P
ROSIER / LUNA SEA
Air on the G String / Bach
Piano Sonata: Moonlight Sonata / Beethoven
Gimme Chocolate!! / BABYMETAL
A Cruel Angel's Thesis / Yoko Takahashi
The Beginning / ONE OK ROCK
And more... More to come!

Welcome to the moment your sound will set the world on fire!
Heavenly Guitars, the ultimate real-time music battle game for all guitar lovers, is finally here!

Heavenly Guitars is a groundbreaking music game that fully captures the joy and passion of guitar playing. Compete online with players from around the world in real time and enjoy exciting performance battles. No complicated controls or specialized knowledge are required. From beginners to experienced guitarists, anyone can easily experience the immersive feeling of being on a real live stage with intuitive and simple controls.

▼Feverish real-time guitar battles with players from all over the world!
The greatest attraction is the ability to compete in real time with players from all over the world. Utilize your own guitar techniques, meticulously crafted original effects, and clever strategies to defeat your opponents in heated battles.
The more victories you gain, the higher you'll climb the world rankings, giving you the perfect opportunity to seize the honor and glory of being a top player! What's more, your strategies are endless, even while your opponent is playing. Utilize effects to enhance the performance and enjoy the immersive battles that feel just like being at a live venue.
Encounter new rivals, discover new goals, and experience your own growth as you battle. A continuous cycle of challenges and growth will lead you to becoming the ultimate guitarist.

▼Exhilarating Game System
All songs in the game feature authentic sheet music created specifically for electric guitar, allowing you to feel like a legendary guitarist.

Captivate the audience with brilliant combos, effects, and guitar performances, thanks to precise play. Maximize the audience's enthusiasm by filling the "Audience Gauge" to its maximum and win the battle. Amaze and thrill the world with your performance!

▼Guitar Customization and Effects System with Infinite Possibilities
You can freely create your own unique guitar. Customize the exterior with body color and unique stickers, as well as change small parts like the pickups and bridge to create the perfect, one-of-a-kind guitar look.

Furthermore, the guitar you create will become a unique and special item, highly valued within the community. Armed with your unique guitar, deliver a distinctive and impactful performance and take to the world stage! 

With Heavenly Guitars, aim to become the ultimate guitarist who will shake the world. The moment your sound will change the world is here!

apps.title: Sort Journey - Travel Puzzle
apps.summary:
Embark on the ultimate sorting adventure around the world! Sort Journey combines relaxing match-3 puzzle gameplay with exciting travel exploration. Match and organize items from exotic destinations while journeying through stunning global locations.

Pack your bags and sort your way across the globe! From the bustling markets of Marrakech to the serene temples of Kyoto, match 3 identical travel items to clear your luggage and unlock new destinations. Strategic sorting meets world discovery in this fresh take on puzzle games.

JOURNEY FEATURES

🌍 1000+ Challenging Levels - Explore dozens of countries and continents
✈️ Stunning Travel Graphics - Visit beautifully designed world landmarks
🎒 Hundreds of Unique Items - Sort souvenirs, snacks, and travel essentials
📍 Global Destinations - Journey from Paris to Tokyo, Rio to Cairo
🧩 Relaxing Yet Strategic - Easy to learn, challenging to master
💎 Helpful Travel Boosters - Power-ups to overcome tricky challenges
📱 Play Offline Anywhere - No WiFi required for your puzzle journey
🎁 Regular Updates - New destinations and seasonal events added

HOW TO PLAY

Match 3 identical items to clear them from your travel pack. Sort strategically to organize all items before moves run out. Use special boosters when you're stuck. Complete levels to unlock new countries and collect cultural items from each destination. Progress through your world journey and become a global sorting master!

SORT & EXPLORE

Each destination brings new items to discover - French pastries in Paris, Japanese tea sets in Tokyo, Egyptian artifacts in Cairo, and tropical fruits in Brazil. Your sorting adventure takes you to markets, airports, hotels, and iconic landmarks around the world.

Download Sort Journey now and start your worldwide puzzle adventure! Whether you're looking for a relaxing brain teaser or a challenging match-3 experience, your global sorting journey awaits.

apps.title: Jewel Coloring
apps.summary:
Jewel Coloring: Sparkle & Create with Pixel Art Puzzles
Enter a vibrant world of glowing jewels where creativity and puzzle-solving come together in perfect harmony! Designed for easy, relaxing fun, this one-of-a-kind experience combines color sorting, pixel art creation, and satisfying casual gameplay all in one. With smooth, user-friendly controls and levels that gently grow more engaging, it’s the perfect way to unwind while keeping your mind active.
How to Play: Color, Sort, & Craft Beautiful Pixel Art
- Sort Jewels by Color with Ease: Just tap and arrange sparkling jewels into their matching color groups. No confusing rules or complicated steps—just simple, enjoyable sorting action.
- Plan & Organize Your Workspace: Keep your jewel shelf neatly arranged and think ahead to clear each puzzle efficiently. Every small choice helps you complete the picture smoothly.
- Uncover Stunning Pixel Art Masterpieces: As you sort and place each jewel, watch as hidden pixel art designs slowly come to life. Every level reveals a brand-new, dazzling image to enjoy.
- Enjoy Endless Creative Satisfaction: There’s no pressure—just calm, rewarding gameplay that turns every moment into a peaceful artistic break.
What Makes Jewel Coloring Special
- Hundreds of Unique Levels & Themes: Enjoy a huge variety of pixel art puzzles, with fresh themes and exclusive limited-time collections added regularly.
- Polished Visuals & Immersive Feedback: Bright, detailed 3D jewels, crisp visual effects, and satisfying audio feedback make every tap feel smooth and rewarding.
- Play Anywhere, No Wi-Fi Needed: Play offline whenever you have free time. Pause, resume, and play at your own speed, no internet connection required.
- Easy for Everyone, Fun for All Ages: Simple mechanics make it accessible for casual players, while thoughtful level design keeps it interesting for puzzle and art fans alike.
Why You’ll Love Jewel Coloring
- Gentle Brain Exercise: Sorting, planning, and matching help support focus, logic, and spatial thinking—all while having fun.
- Natural Stress Relief: Lose yourself in calming, rhythmic jewel sorting that helps you relax and unwind after a busy day.
- For All Skill Levels: Whether you’re looking for a quick distraction or a creative hobby, it’s made for kids, adults, and everyone in between.
Download Jewel Coloring today and step into a bright, peaceful world of color, jewels, and pixel art. Create, sort, and relax—your next artistic adventure is just a tap away!

Join Bluey in a new adventure game with story by the show's creator. A NEW BLUEY STORY
Dive into an adventure game fueled by a brand-new story from the show's creator! Discover the humor and warmth Bluey brings in this fun new game for the family, with story by Joe Brumm.

EMBARK ON A HEART-WARMING ADVENTURE
Bluey is drawing at the table when Dad suddenly yoinks the Gold Pen she needs! Bluey sets off on an adventure with the whole family. Mum designs the strange and distant lands, Dad rocks up on his cool bike as self-declared King Goldie Horns, and Bingo transforms into her honk-happy alter ego — Bingooose! Away they go on an exciting quest to retrieve the Gold Pen – and have heaps of fun along the way.

A mysterious plague has swept across the world, leaving chaos in its wake. As a plague doctor, you become the town's final beacon of hope. Build and manage a sanctuary, heal those you can, and guide your people through the darkest days of the pandemic. Your strategy will shape their future.

[The Sanctuary of Hope]
Run your sanctuary as the last refuge against the plague.
Treat patients, craft herbal remedies, and expand your wards to shelter the growing tide of the sick and desperate.

[Counter the Rat Swarm]
Hold the last line against the Rat Swarm.
Recruit and upgrade your heroes. Build as many defensive towers as you can. Slay the Rat King to repel the swarm.

[Gather Resources, Rebuild the Town]
Dispatch survivors to gather resources and secure outposts in the wild.
Collect timber, herbs, food, and other essential supplies. Construct production facilities, expand warehouses, and upgrade residential buildings to house more survivors.

[Seize Abandoned Ruins]
Form elite squads of heroes to reclaim plague-ridden towns.
Create the best lineup of different types of heroes. Outsmart contenders on the battlefield. Gain control of crucial cities. Expand your territory in this world.
