apps.title: Rogue Legend - Roguelike RPG
apps.summary:
Embark on an action roguelike RPG adventure with Rogue Legend, where every battle makes your hero stronger.
In Rogue Legend, you journey through worlds filled with monsters, treasures, and powerful bosses. Each run is a new roguelike RPG experience of strategy, combat, and growth, giving you the chance to strengthen your hero and push further with every run.

Enter a World of Endless Battles:
Every session begins in the lobby. Press Play and roll the dice to start your roguelike RPG run, diving into a board-based action RPG full of encounters and surprises. As your hero moves across the board, different events unfold depending on where you land:
* Enemy Tiles: Engage in fast, automatic roguelike RPG battles. After each fight, choose one of three upgrades to shape your build.
* Buff Tiles: Gain boosts to attack, defense, and speed to help your hero survive longer in Rogue Legend’s idle-friendly dungeons.
* Negative Tiles: Face debuffs that test your timing and strategic decisions.
* Minigame Tiles: Roll for luck in short events where you can win extra loot or power-ups.
* Shop Tiles: Spend gold to buy new gear, upgrades, and legendary equipment.
* Special Tiles: Additional tile types will be added over time to expand Rogue Legend’s gameplay depth.

Defeat Bosses and Grow Stronger:
Your goal is to survive, adapt, and conquer every boss battle. Each fight is an opportunity to grow stronger, unlocking new roguelike RPG challenges, rewards, and abilities that prepare your hero for the next run in this idle RPG adventure.

Upgrade, Progress, and Customize Your Hero:
Between runs, return to the lobby to enhance your hero through Rogue Legend’s RPG progression systems:
* Gear System: Collect and upgrade your weapons, armor, and equipment.
* Talent System: Level up to unlock new stats, passive abilities, and bonuses that fit your playstyle.
* Pet System: Obtain and train pets that join you in combat (coming soon).

Roguelike Depth with Idle RPG Progression
Rogue Legend blends the excitement of roguelike gameplay with the satisfaction of RPG and idle progression. Each run feels fast, rewarding, and different. The board and dice mechanics make every move matter, while the idle RPG design ensures steady progress without repetitive grind.

A Journey of Strategy and Power:
If you enjoy roguelike action, RPG adventure, and idle gameplay, Rogue Legend delivers a journey of endless replayability.
⚔️ Fight, roll, and rise again in Rogue Legend, the roguelike idle RPG where every battle shapes your hero’s fate.

apps.title: Arrow Cube Escape
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrow Cube Escape.
This logic puzzle game, featuring a simple yet beautiful design, will test your thinking skills, concentration, and creativity.
Carefully navigate the intricately intertwined maze of arrows and remove them all without a single mistake.
Each stage presents a unique challenge combining logic, timing, and spatial awareness.

Enjoy a satisfying puzzle experience that demands both flashes of insight and strategic thinking.

Remove stacked colorful blocks in the direction of the arrows and sort them into boxes of the same color. Think carefully before placing blocks in temporary slots—strategic action to avoid wasting space is key. Levels grow progressively more difficult as you advance.

Your goal is simple, but complacency is dangerous.
Remove arrows in the correct sequence to fit all blocks into the boxes.
If a box overflows, you can no longer remove blocks.
Anticipate moves, imagine chain reactions, and find the optimal sequence.

Whether you're a seasoned puzzle enthusiast or a beginner,
Arrow Cube Escape offers the dual pleasure of “the joy of thinking” and “calming relaxation.”

Every puzzle is a story of logic, patience, and precision.
Can you remove all the arrows from the colorful blocks without overflowing the box?

Test your thinking skills in a quiet, beautiful world.
Arrow Cube Escape will become your new “healing time for thinking.”

apps.title: Kuroko's Basketball SR
apps.summary:
This all-new, hotblooded basketball competitive mobile game, "Kuroko's Basketball Street Rivals," is an instant head-to-head action game adapted from the popular Japanese basketball anime "Kuroko's Basketball." It faithfully recreates the world of the original work. You can develop and train a wide array of iconic players like Kuroko Tetsuya and Kagami Taiga, and then take direct control to experience the anime's intense and thrilling basketball matches. With a variety of rich gameplay modes, get ready to reignite your passion and relive the excitement of "Kuroko's Basketball"!

[Breathtaking Skill Animations!]
Perfectly recreate each character's signature skills, like Kuroko's "Misdirection" and Kagami's "Air Walk." Use your matserful controls to execute the most dazzling skill combos!

[Multiple Modes & Thrilling Multiplayer Online Battles!]
Beyond the core 3v3 match mode, enjoy a variety of other modes like 1v1, 2v2, and Ranked Matches. Dive into intense real-time competition against players from across the entire server!

[The Kings of Every Team Assemble!]
It's not just Seirin and Kaijo High-all the powerhouse schools from "Kuroko's Basketball" are gathered here! Freely develop your favorite players and bring them into the fray!

[100% Faithful Story, Featuring Original Voices!]
Dive into the distinctive Story Mode, which fully incorporates the original anime voice-overs and plot. Become a member of the team and personally experience every single match from the story!

apps.title: Dead by Extraction
apps.summary:
The sun set long ago in the world you knew, leaving behind only the ink-stained silence of the discarded. Welcome to the grey between life and loss—a sketchbook of crumbling brick and forgotten dust where the architecture is as hungry as the ghosts. You are a Scavenger, a flickering candle in a forest of grey, rummaging through the ribcages of dead buildings to reclaim the scrap of the past. But beware: every hallway is a throat waiting to swallow you whole, and every shadow has a name.
Escape the ruins... or become part of them.

THE LOOP: SEARCH. FIGHT. ESCAPE.
The rules of the ruin are simple but deadly. Enter the zone, fill your pockets with relic scrap, and find the extraction point before the clock strikes midnight.
• Scavenge the Shadows: Rummage through the rot of schools, hospitals, and houses to find the materials you need.
• Banish the Residents: Use ancient exorcist tools to fight back the ghouls that haunt the halls.
• The Final Run: If you don't reach the exit in time, the ruins will claim you—and everything you’ve gathered—forever.

CRAFT YOUR CURSE: Roguelike Combat
No two descents into the dark are the same. As you battle through the corridors, the ghosts you defeat grant you flickering memories of power.
• Triple-Threat Evolution: Choose between three twisted power-ups in the heat of battle to evolve your survival.
• Synergize to Survive: Will you focus on blinding light, serrated steel, or protective charms? Your build is the only thing between you and a permanent stay in the ward.

ARSENAL OF THE EXORCIST
With over 50 unique Talismanic Tools to collect, your playstyle is yours to define. From rusted ritual blades to spectral lanterns, every tool features a deep Perk Tree.

SHELTER OF SCRAP: Camp Operation
You aren't the only one trapped in the grey. Deep within the ruins, you’ll find "The Broken"—hostages of the haunts who are waiting for a savior.
• Rescue & Rebuild: Bring survivors back to your camp to unlock specialized shops and powerful services.
• Management of the Macabre: Your camp is your only sanctuary. Use your extracted loot to fortify your home and prepare for the next night.

GAME FEATURES:
• Gothic Hand-Drawn Art: A beautiful eerie world inspired by classic lite-horror sketches.
• High-Stakes Extraction: The thrill of "Search-Fight-Extract" compressed into bite-sized, casual sessions.
• Urban Exploration (Urbex): Explore 8+ distinct environments, from the Hollow High School to the Echoing Offices.
• Endless Variety: Dozens of heroes to unbind and hundreds of weapon/perk combinations to master.

THE RUINS ARE CALLING. WILL YOU ANSWER, OR WILL YOU FADE?

Dive into a surreal ocean abyss in an atmospheric puzzle-adventure. Explore dangerous waters, possess sea creatures and solve environmental puzzles to discover what lies deep below the surface…

SILT is a surreal underwater puzzle-adventure game. Alone in an underwater abyss, you are a diver searching the deep to uncover long-forgotten mysteries.
Possess the creatures around you to solve puzzles and travel further into the darkness…

Nature has evolved into bizarre forms. Discover strange organisms, unexplored ruins and ancient machinery hidden beneath the water’s surface.

Survive encounters with giant deep-sea goliaths. Harness their power to awaken a long-dormant force at the centre of the abyss.

Experience art brought to life. SILT’s unsettling, monochrome world is constructed from the sketches and dark imagination of artist Mr Mead. A harrowing journey awaits you…

EPILEPSY WARNING

Please read before playing this game or allowing your children to play it:
Some people are susceptible to epileptic seizures or loss of consciousness when exposed to certain flashing lights and moving patterns in everyday life. Such people may have a seizure while watching television images or playing certain video games. This may happen even if the person has no medical history of epilepsy or has never had any epileptic seizures.

If you or anyone in your family has ever had symptoms related to epilepsy (seizures or loss of consciousness) when exposed to flashing lights or moving patterns, consult your doctor prior to playing this game. If you or your family experience any symptoms of seizure while playing this game, such as dizziness, nausea, or loss of consciousness, stop playing immediately and seek medical attention.
